description_long: This lantern features a robust, angular wooden post with dark metallic reinforcements at each joint and base, giving it a sturdy and medieval appearance. The post is mounted on a wide, square stone or metal base for stability, and it extends upward before angling out horizontally to support a hanging lantern. The lantern itself is suspended by a short, thick chain and has a boxy, metal-framed design with dark glass or opaque panels. Subtle engraved patterns are visible on the wood and metal, adding a decorative touch to the utilitarian structure. The overall construction suggests durability and is well-suited for outdoor urban environments such as streets or parks.
description: A sturdy, medieval-style lantern with a wooden post, metal reinforcements, and a hanging boxy lantern suspended by a chain. Decorative engravings accent the wood and metal, and the base is wide and stable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed top, central post, and the wide, square base with metal reinforcements.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the angled arm supporting the hanging lantern and the chain attachment, highlighting the lantern's boxy shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the post and base, with visible metal bands and engraved patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the angled arm and lantern from the other direction, emphasizing the wood grain and decorative motifs.
